---
  title: "Module III"
---
  
  # Statistical Modelling for Epidemiological Research
  
  ## Topics
  
  ### Epidemiological Study Designs
  
  ### Regression Analysis
  
  - Linear Regression
- Logistic Regression
- Poisson Regression

### Mixed Effects Models

### Survival Analysis

### Machine Learning Applications

## Practical Sessions

- Risk factor analysis
- Outbreak investigation
- Predictive modelling
